mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_LOCATION ( location_id, business_id, name, zip_code, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, location_type, description, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_LOCATION_PK.nextval, #{businessId}, #{name}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{locationType}, #{description}, sysdate )
